context: Verify that the agent detects ClawVault is already present in REVIEWED.md and stops without creating any new files or entries.

checklist.name: REVIEWED.md is searched before any file is created
checklist.description: The agent checks REVIEWED.md for the repo URL (versatly/clawvault) or slug (versatly-clawvault) before attempting to write any new file.

checklist.name: references/REFERENCE_INDEX.md is also checked
checklist.description: The agent checks REFERENCE_INDEX.md in addition to REVIEWED.md as part of the duplicate detection step.

checklist.name: Duplicate match is identified and the existing entry is cited
checklist.description: The agent explicitly identifies that versatly/clawvault already exists in REVIEWED.md and references the existing entry (versatly-clawvault section or slug).

checklist.name: No new references/<slug>.md file is created
checklist.description: The agent does not create any new file under references/ for this tool.

checklist.name: No new row is added to the REVIEWED.md summary table
checklist.description: The REVIEWED.md summary table is not modified. No new row is appended.

checklist.name: No new detailed section is added to REVIEWED.md
checklist.description: The REVIEWED.md body is not modified. No new detailed section is written for this tool.

checklist.name: No new row is added to REFERENCE_INDEX.md
checklist.description: references/REFERENCE_INDEX.md is not modified. No new entry is added for this tool.

checklist.name: The duplicate is reported clearly to the user
checklist.description: The agent communicates that this tool has already been triaged, naming the existing entry (versatly-clawvault or the REVIEWED.md section).

checklist.name: Path or location of the existing entry is provided
checklist.description: The agent tells the user where the existing entry is (e.g. REVIEWED.md section 'versatly-clawvault' or references/versatly-clawvault.md).

checklist.name: Workflow halts without requesting further action
checklist.description: The agent stops after reporting the duplicate and does not continue with the triage workflow steps.
